messages.speaker: girl
messages.text: thank you, thats actually really sweet

messages.speaker: duke
messages.text: i need that around me fr

messages.speaker: duke
messages.text: like tom needs jerry

messages.speaker: girl
messages.text: lmaooo thats actually funny

messages.speaker: girl
messages.text: bet then, what do u study

messages.speaker: girl
messages.text: id love to keep you company one day

messages.speaker: duke
messages.text: careful, i might actually hold you to that

messages.speaker: girl
messages.text: guess ill have to be careful what i say then

messages.speaker: girl
messages.text: im studying healthcare administration

messages.speaker: duke
messages.text: damn you tryna run the whole hospital or what

messages.speaker: girl
messages.text: hell yea thats the plan

messages.speaker: duke
messages.text: i respect that, i can tell you actually got goals

messages.speaker: girl
messages.text: im only gonna be in town for the weekend

messages.speaker: duke
messages.text: mm lets make one of those days count then

messages.speaker: girl
messages.text: you making plans already

messages.speaker: girl
messages.text: you were close, it is adorable

messages.speaker: duke
messages.text: cmon i wont find this energy anywhere else

messages.speaker: duke
messages.text: i need that around me fr

messages.speaker: girl
messages.text: you are so dramatic

messages.speaker: duke
messages.text: you remember us meeting last week or am i trippin

messages.speaker: girl
messages.text: yeaa i remember

messages.speaker: duke
messages.text: good, thought i imagined the whole interaction for a sec

messages.speaker: duke
messages.text: ngl from the little we talked you seem like good energy

messages.speaker: girl
messages.text: aww thank you

messages.speaker: duke
messages.text: nah im serious, thats kinda rare these days

messages.speaker: girl
messages.text: im not really looking for anything right now

messages.speaker: duke
messages.text: i completely respect that

messages.speaker: duke
messages.text: but a girl like you aint easy to come across, dont send me back out there

messages.speaker: girl
messages.text: that made me giggle, thats actually cute

messages.speaker: duke
messages.text: howd you end up spending your 4th then

messages.speaker: girl
messages.text: went to the lake w some friends then watched fireworks

messages.speaker: duke
messages.text: sounds like i missed out lowkey

messages.speaker: girl
messages.text: go to sleep

messages.speaker: duke
messages.text: go shower first then ill think about it

messages.speaker: girl
messages.text: child anyways
